message:
⚡ Memoize availableClusters + clusterInfoMap in GlobalFiltersProvider (#10659)

Both values were recomputed on every render without useMemo, creating
new array/object references that invalidated the context useMemo deps
and caused all GlobalFilters consumers to re-render unnecessarily.

Wrap both in useMemo(() => ..., [deduplicatedClusters]).

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
